case_title: ANDRE DE FIGUEIREDO ET AL VS. BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,108.00 FILED BY DE FIGUEIREDO, ANDRE NGUYEN, PHI ANH AS TO DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED DEC-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL)
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-10-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES (2) BY PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFFS TO RE-SERVED THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-150) REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE FIGUEIREDO, ANDRE NGUYEN, PHI ANH
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-10-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-12-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, PHI ANH
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT RECEIVED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-15-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANH PHI NGUYEN EXCEPT PLAINTIFF ANDRE DE FIGUEIREDO WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION;DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE FIGUEIREDO, ANDRE NGUYEN, PHI ANH AS TO DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL)
DECLARATION OF ANDRE DE FIGUEIREDO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE FIGUEIREDO, ANDRE NGUYEN, PHI ANH
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-19-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-15-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER ON PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION;DECLARATION - GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $140.00) SERVED OCT-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 ALL PRESENT; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT- TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-15 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 ALL ARE PRESENT; HEARING HELD; JUDGMENT RENDERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT- AS OF NOV-19-15 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED; (D-506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE FIGUEIREDO, ANDRE NGUYEN, PHI ANH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAZILIAN TRAVEL SERVICE, LTD (DBA BACC TRAVEL) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
